policy.note: This guard validates the owner decision packet and its source-root templates. It does not apply owner decisions.

findings.message: Packet status must be ready.
Packet must not record decisions.
Packet must not mutate the decision session.
Packet must not read private content.
Packet must not copy private content.
Packet must not write public files.
Packet must not write public manifests.
Packet must keep public-ready at 0.
Pending packet must not allow private diagnostic yet.
Packet must not contain a selected decision.
Packet must not contain a selected root path.
Candidate integrity must be ready.
Decision session must remain pending.
Decision session must not contain selected_decision.
Decision session must not contain selected_root_path.
Packet must expose at least three decision templates.
keep_blocked template must exist.
repair_onedrive_first template must exist.
Unlocking templates must match owner-confirmable exact roots.
Only one unlocking template is allowed before owner selection.
Template must record the session only after owner confirmation.
Template selected_decision must be allowed: keep_blocked
Non-unlocking templates must not include a root path.
Template must record the session only after owner confirmation.
Template selected_decision must be allowed: repair_onedrive_first
Non-unlocking templates must not include a root path.
Template must record the session only after owner confirmation.
Template selected_decision must be allowed: select_existing_root_for_private_diagnostic
Unlocking template must use select_existing_root_for_private_diagnostic.
Unlocking template must include an absolute selected_root_path.
Unlocking template root must match an owner-confirmable exact root.

next_actions: Use this guarded packet as the owner-facing source-root decision surface.
Record a decision only after explicit owner/KosmoOverseer confirmation.
Rerun source-root decision-session check and day batch after any recorded decision.
